refactorItems.title: Type annotation cleanup for image parameters
refactorItems.description: Replace `str | Path | Any` with `str | Path | PIL.Image.Image` for `image`, `start_image`, and `end_image` parameters. Use a TYPE_CHECKING guard or lazy import for PIL.Image.

refactorItems.title: CPU-safe smoke test for empty_wan_latent_video
refactorItems.description: Add a pytest test that calls empty_wan_latent_video(width=64, height=64, length=5) and asserts the returned dict has 'samples' with shape [1, 16, 2, 8, 8]. No GPU required.

refactorItems.title: Docstrings for run() in wan21 pipeline modules
refactorItems.description: Add one-paragraph docstrings to each run() explaining parameters, HF-only model resolution, and return value (list of PIL Images / frames).
